home.title: Dungeon Sweep
home.subtitle: One board, one life. Numbers show the total strength of monsters nearby — even the ones you already know about. Grow strong, then take the dragon's crown.

ui.markHint: 💡 Long-press a dark tile to mark a number

mousey.name: Mousey
mousey.trait: A tiny snack of XP. The Mouse King's crown reveals them all.

flitter.name: Flitter
flitter.trait: A flappy little thing. Honest 2 damage.

cuddle.name: Cuddlekin
cuddle.trait: Never alone — its twin is always in a touching tile.

pudding.name: Croaky
pudding.trait: A wobbly 5. The Sage’s scroll reveals every croaky.

gazer.name: Peeper
gazer.trait: Numbers near it read as ?. Pop it to see clearly again.

mouseking.name: Mouse King
mouseking.trait: The big boss rat. Drops a scroll that reveals every mousey.

moobo.name: Moobo
moobo.trait: Always stands beside a chest — and stares right at it.

guard.name: Doorman
guard.trait: Four wolf doormen, one napping in each quarter of the dungeon.

jelly.name: Jubjub
jelly.trait: Five of them huddle around the Sage.

giant.name: Big Softie
giant.trait: Two lovers resting in the same row, mirrored around the middle. Each drops a medikit… if you have the heart.

mineking.name: Boomfather
mineking.trait: Drops the scroll that defuses every bomb on the board.

mimic.name: Boxer
mimic.trait: Poses as a lovely present. A gift that won't open… isn't a gift.

dragon.name: The Dragon
dragon.trait: Visible from the very start. 13 damage. Take its crown to win.

sage.name: Sage
sage.trait: Level 1 — but guarded by five Jubjubs. Drops the croaky-finder.

boomy.name: Bombom
boomy.trait: Poisons nearby numbers sky-high. Only the Boomfather's scroll can defuse it.

gnome.name: Snickerdoo
gnome.trait: Hops away toward the nearest medikit. Corner it for 9 XP, free.

egg.name: Dragon Egg
egg.trait: Harmless. Breakable for 3 XP — but keeping it whole earns a badge.

tut.s1: Welcome! Tap any dark tile to flip it. The 🐉 is already visible — that's your final goal.
tut.s2: Numbers = total strength of ALL monsters around them (corpses count until you collect them, and 💣 make numbers huge).
tut.s3: Tapping a monster attacks it: you lose HP equal to its strength. You must have MORE HP than its level to survive — try a small one.
tut.s4: Tap corpses to collect their XP, then press ⬆ Level up to grow (it also fully heals you). Beat the dragon, tap its 👑, and win!

float.tooWeak: Too weak to dig — 1 HP left

help.title: How to Play
p1: One board, one life. The dragon is visible from the start — defeat it and tap the crown it drops to win.
Tap a dark tile to flip it. Flipping a monster means fighting it instantly, so the numbers are your eyes.
Long-press a dark tile to place a note mark, e.g. a monster level you deduced.
Closing the page is safe: your run auto-saves and resumes.
p2: A number = total strength of ALL monsters in the 8 tiles around it. Two level-3s nearby make 6.
Corpses still count until collected — numbers drop when you pick them up, not when you kill.
Tapping a monster attacks it: you lose HP equal to its level. You must have STRICTLY more HP than its level — a tie kills you.
Tap a defeated monster again to collect its XP in gold.
A bomb has strength 100: nearby numbers explode (103 = one bomb + 3 real). Unfightable — only the Boomfather's scroll defuses them.
? = the Peeper's fog: numbers within two tiles are hidden until you pop it.
p3: Fill the gold row, then press Level up: full heal + higher max HP (even levels grow half a heart). Timing this is the core strategy.
Medikit: tap for a full heal — wasted at full HP, save it for emergencies.
Chest: opens to a gem (+5 XP). Wall: each dig costs 1 HP, three digs to break, and you cannot dig at 1 HP.
The orb reveals a circle around it; the spell orb prefers to light up bomb country.
Boss drops are scrolls: Mouse King reveals all mousies, the Sage all croakies, the Boomfather defuses all bombs.
p4: Red frames cost HP, green frames are pure gain — but beware the Boxer posing as a present (a gift that won't open isn't a gift).

Placement rules are reliable clues: the Boomfather is always in a corner; a Moobo always stands beside a chest (never straight above/below); one Doorman per quarter; the giant lovers face each other in one row.
The Snickerdoo always hops toward the nearest medikit — chase it to find medicine.
After falling, tap 'See the whole board' for a full post-mortem.
Four badges: clear everything · spare the giant lovers · keep the egg whole · harm no mousey.
